posts.author: rashipande (Rashi Pande)
posts.cookedHtml:
Eligeo is excited announce that our monday.com Essentials Courses are back!
Our next cohort starts on August 2nd and we have more options available
Check them out here: monday.com Essentials Course Schedule

This course is perfect for you if:

  • You are looking for a team productivity tool that your staff will actually use

  • You are a pro-level account holder who wants to make the most of what monday.com

  • You want to create custom workflows and automation to save time for yourself and your team

  • You are a manager who wants a clear overview of all your projects, team workload, and capacity

In just 5 weeks, you will have a solid understanding of:

  • monday.com basics
  • advanced topics like connected boards, automation, integrations, and reporting
  • specific use cases of monday.com in Sales, Customer Success, CRM, Project Management, HR Management, Creative Content, and Marketing Management
  • At the end of each class, you will have the chance to discuss a solution that you are building, with your instructor

Upon completion of this course, you’ll walk away with not just the in-depth knowledge on how to use monday.com, but also a workspace you build, assessed by our instructor, and a certificate of completion from Eligeo.
*Please note that there are limited spots available. Click on the registration link or simply respond to this email to register today!
